summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShelfScan AI app with Google Auth integration. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, protected routes, dashboard, history, and navigation.
passed_tests: Dashboard stats API returns correct data
History API returns audit data with summary

Protected routes redirect when not authenticated
History page loads with filter functionality
New Audit page loads with form validation
Form interactions and button states working
Filter buttons on history page functional
